# Play By Ear

Play By Ear is a creative AI studio and workshop practice founded by Marlene Ronstedt.

Site: https://www.playbyear.xyz/

## What Play By Ear Does

- Hands-on vibe coding workshops for non-technical teams
- Creative AI workshops and training sessions
- MC and event hosting, panel moderation, demo day hosting, hackathon hosting, and onstage facilitation
- Interactive launch experiences, microsites, playful demos, and creative technology projects
- One-on-one vibe coding setup sessions

## Key Pages

- Home: https://www.playbyear.xyz/
- Vibe Coding Workshops: https://www.playbyear.xyz/workshops
- MC & Event Hosting: https://www.playbyear.xyz/hosting
- Projects and selected work: https://www.playbyear.xyz/projects
- Contact: https://www.playbyear.xyz/contact

## Workshop Summary

Play By Ear runs two-hour hands-on vibe coding workshops where non-technical participants build and ship a live website with AI-assisted coding. Workshops are available for teams, events, hackathons, and selected cities in North America and Europe.

## Hosting Summary

Marlene Ronstedt is bookable through Play By Ear as an MC, event host, panel moderator, demo day host, hackathon host, and onstage facilitator for AI, tech, crypto, startup, conference, workshop, and creative technology events.

## Contact

For workshop, hosting, and project inquiries, use https://www.playbyear.xyz/contact or book a discovery call from the site.
